words.def: (astronomy) an indistinct surface feature of Mars once thought to be a system of channels; they are now believed to be an optical illusion
words.zh: n. 運河, 水道, 管, 溝渠

words.def: of or related to the anus
words.zh: a. 肛門的, 肛門附近的

words.def: group of people related by blood or marriage
words.zh: n. 氏族, 宗族, 集團

words.def: mother of the ancient Irish gods; sometimes identified with Danu
words.zh: n. 言論集, 語錄, 軼事

words.def: airtight sealed metal container for food or drink or paint etc.
